[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101000000 2
1 1100100100 4
2 1010000000 2
3 0001000000 1
4 0101000000 2
5 1101100101 6
6 1111000000 4
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0101100001 4
12 21 0100100000 2
23 32 1100000000 2
34 43 0011000010 3
45 54 0001000010 2
56 65 1101000000 3
67 76 1000000000 1
70 07 0000000000 a match 7

02 20 0100100000 2
13 31 0111000000 3
24 42 0000000000 a match 7
35 53 1101000010 4
46 64 0001000000 1 match 3
57 75 1000000000 1
60 06 0101100001 4
71 17 0010000000 1

14 41 0011010000 3
25 52 1100000000 2
36 63 1101000000 3
47 74 0010000000 1
50 05 0101000000 2 match 0 4
61 16 0101100001 4
72 27 1000000000 1

04 40 0001000000 1 match 3
15 51 0101000000 2 match 0 4
26 62 1100100100 4 match 1
37 73 1010000000 2 match 2
